title: otites wolgensis
intro: Otites wolgensis, commonly known as Wolfsbane or Monk's Hood, is a plant species in the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). This plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including anxiety, insomnia, and epilepsy, due to its sedative and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Otites wolgensis include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and alleviating symptoms of insomnia and epilepsy. The bioactive constituents of Otites wolgensis include alkaloids, glycosides, and saponins, which exhibit therapeutic actions such as sedative, antispasmodic, and anti-inflammatory effects.
